top_gap_prompt: Best way to build a self-service knowledge base that reduces inbound support volume for a support and success teams at bootstrapped and growth-stage SaaS companies team
category_long: simple email-based customer support platform for customer-centric teams

gaps.title: Missing FAQPage schema on pricing and comparison pages
gaps.description: Help Scout's pricing page does not include FAQPage markup, causing it to miss high-intent 'how much does X cost' and 'X vs Y pricing' slots in Google AI Overviews.

gaps.title: Thin or missing dedicated competitor-comparison pages
gaps.description: Help Scout lacks depth on '[brand] vs [competitor]' comparison pages, making it less likely to appear when AI models answer alternative/comparison queries.

gaps.title: No HowTo schema on documentation and tutorial pages
gaps.description: Help Scout's help center and tutorials lack HowTo structured data, reducing appearance in step-by-step instructional responses from Google AI Overviews and Perplexity.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: Best way to build a self-service knowledge base that reduces inbound support volume for a support and success teams at bootstrapped and growth-stage SaaS companies team
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Use-case prompts reach buyers at the exact moment they need your solution. These are the highest-converting prompt type in AI search.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: How can a Support Manager or Customer Ops Lead at a customer-first company manage shared team email inboxes and live chat without a ticket-based system more efficiently?
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Use-case prompts reach buyers at the exact moment they need your solution. These are the highest-converting prompt type in AI search.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: Best customer support that works with Slack and HubSpot
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Integration queries signal technical buyers in the evaluation stage. Missing here loses decision-stage opportunities to tools that have stronger integration documentation.
